sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Helio Aligns Capital Strategy With Space Market Expansion
feed.summary: Helio Corporation (OTC PINK:HLEO) has hired a senior capital markets advisor to explore uplisting its shares to a national securities exchange like NASDAQ or NYSE. This strategic move aims to strengthen corporate governance, enhance financial reporting, and improve access to institutional capital to support the company's long-term growth and its development of advanced space power and engineering solutions. Helio views this as essential for executing its strategy in space-based solar power and lunar infrastructure, reinforcing its commitment to becoming a leading public-market company in the commercial space sector.

feed.title: Viatris to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
feed.summary: Viatris Inc. (Nasdaq: VTRS) announced it will report its first-quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, May 7, 2026. Company executives will host a webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET on the same day to discuss the results, which will be accessible to investors and the public via investor.viatris.com. Viatris is a global healthcare company focused on empowering people worldwide to live healthier lives by providing generics, established brands, and innovative medicines.

feed.title: PTC to Announce Fiscal Q2'26 Results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026
feed.summary: PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) announced it will release its fiscal Q2 2026 financial results on Wednesday, May 6th, after the stock market closes. Senior management will host a live webcast and conference call at 5 PM ET to discuss the results. The earnings press release and related materials will be available on the company's Investor Relations website prior to the call.

feed.title: Guyasuta Investment Advisors Inc. Makes New Investment in Keysight Technologies Inc. $KEYS
feed.summary: Guyasuta Investment Advisors Inc. has made a new investment in Keysight Technologies Inc., purchasing 5,597 shares valued at approximately $1.137 million in Q4. Despite recent insider selling, 84.58% of the stock is held by institutional investors, and Keysight Technologies reported strong Q1 results, beating EPS and revenue estimates. Analysts currently rate the stock as a "Moderate Buy" with an average target price of $304.17.

feed.title: Republic Services, Inc. $RSG is Guyasuta Investment Advisors Inc.'s 5th Largest Position
feed.summary: Guyasuta Investment Advisors Inc. increased its stake in Republic Services (NYSE:RSG) by 2.0% to 344,535 shares, making it their fifth-largest holding. Wall Street analysts generally rate RSG as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus target price of $247.00. Republic Services recently reported strong Q4 earnings, surpassing estimates, and announced a quarterly dividend of $0.625.

feed.title: BofA downgrades NXP Semiconductors stock rating on limited leverage By Investing.com
feed.summary: BofA Securities downgraded NXP Semiconductors NV to Neutral from Buy, lowering its price target to $230 from $245 due to concerns about limited earnings leverage. The firm cited NXP's lack of AI products, limited EV exposure, and higher reliance on consumer phones and IoT. Despite the downgrade, InvestingPro analysis suggests the stock may be undervalued and the company has shown resilience in past downcycles.

feed.title: Retirement Guys Formula LLC Has $1.20 Million Holdings in AT&T Inc. $T
feed.summary: Retirement Guys Formula LLC increased its stake in AT&T Inc. by 372.6% in the fourth quarter of last year, now holding shares valued at $1.20 million. This comes as AT&T reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, and declared a quarterly dividend of $0.2775 per share. Several other institutional investors also significantly increased their positions in the telecommunications giant.

feed.title: Retirement Guys Formula LLC Has $1.74 Million Stock Holdings in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: Retirement Guys Formula LLC increased its stake in GE Vernova Inc. by 66.3% in Q4, now holding 2,661 shares valued at approximately $1.74 million. This move aligns with positive analyst sentiment and strategic expansion in Europe for GE Vernova. However, the company faces risks from a lawsuit regarding an offshore wind farm and a recent increase in short interest.

feed.title: Microsoft pauses all future carbon removal purchases - report
feed.summary: Microsoft has reportedly paused all future carbon removal purchases, a significant move for the industry given the company's status as the largest corporate buyer of such credits. While Microsoft denied an indefinite pause, stating it continually assesses its portfolio and market conditions, this decision comes as the company grapples with increased carbon emissions due to AI growth despite its aggressive carbon removal strategy. The pause also impacts the broader carbon removal market, which has faced recent funding shifts and political scrutiny.

feed.title: Canadian wealth firms get one platform for crypto and tokenized assets
feed.summary: Broadridge (NYSE: BR) has launched a new digital asset platform in Canada for wealth managers, enabling them to support cryptocurrencies and tokenized real-world assets. The platform offers a unified operating model for trading, custody, asset servicing, and proxy voting, integrating traditional and digital assets. This initiative aims to accelerate digital adoption in Canada, leveraging Broadridge's existing tokenization infrastructure which handles over US$8 trillion in assets monthly.

feed.title: Broadridge Launches Next-Generation Digital Asset Capabilities for Canadian Wealth Management Firms
feed.summary: Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc. (NYSE: BR) has launched a new digital asset platform for Canadian wealth management firms, enabling them to offer cryptocurrencies and tokenized assets to clients. The platform integrates traditional and digital assets into a single operating model, providing support for various digital assets, advisor-driven and self-directed models, and full regulatory compliance. This initiative addresses the rising investor demand for digital assets and aims to simplify the operational complexities for wealth managers.

feed.title: PTC posts fiscal Q2 results May 6, then hosts a 5 p.m. ET webcast
feed.summary: PTC (NASDAQ: PTC) announced it will release its fiscal second-quarter 2026 results on Wednesday, May 6, 2026, after the market closes. Senior management will host a live webcast and conference call to discuss the results at 5:00 PM ET on the same day. Investors can access the earnings release, presentation, and financial tables on the PTC Investor Relations website before the call.

feed.title: Otis takes majority stake in AI, IoT service firm WeMaintain
feed.summary: Otis Worldwide Corporation announced on April 13, 2026, that it has acquired a majority stake in WeMaintain, a technology-enabled elevator and escalator service company. This investment aims to advance service technology, support WeMaintain's growth, and create long-term value for both organizations. Both companies will continue to operate as separate entities, with WeMaintain retaining its independent offering of agnostic IoT and AI-based solutions to its customers.

feed.title: Alliance Resource Partners, L.P. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Alliance Resource Partners, L.P. (ARLP) will report its first quarter 2026 financial results before the market opens on Monday, April 27, 2026. The company will host a conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern on the same day to discuss these results. Investors can access the call via phone or ARLP's website, with an audio replay available for approximately one week.

feed.title: What to watch May 7: Viatris posts Q1 results, holds webcast
feed.summary: Viatris (Nasdaq: VTRS) is scheduled to report its first quarter 2026 financial results on Thursday, May 7, 2026, and will host a live webcast at 8:30 a.m. ET to discuss the results. Investors can access the webcast via investor.viatris.com or by phone. The announcement details previous stock movements following similar earnings date notices and provides key metrics for the upcoming event.

feed.title: Old North State Wealth Management LLC Boosts Stock Holdings in GE Vernova Inc. $GEV
feed.summary: Old North State Wealth Management LLC significantly increased its stake in GE Vernova Inc. (NYSE:GEV) by 281.7% in Q4, acquiring an additional 4,062 shares to reach a total of 5,504 shares valued at $3.598 million. This move makes GE Vernova its 23rd largest position, representing 1.7% of its portfolio. The article highlights positive analyst sentiment, GE Vernova's expansion into Europe and SMR nuclear services, alongside risks such as a lawsuit and increased short interest.

feed.title: Paragon Capital Management Inc. Invests $1.41 Million in Roper Technologies, Inc. $ROP
feed.summary: Paragon Capital Management Inc. initiated a new position in Roper Technologies (ROP) in Q4, acquiring 3,171 shares valued at $1.41 million. Roper Technologies reported Q4 EPS of $5.21, beating estimates, and projected FY2026 EPS between $21.30 and $21.55. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.91, and a recent insider purchase of 1,400 shares by a director signals confidence.

feed.title: Dollar General aims to reach shoppers with AI audio in 12,000 stores
feed.summary: Dollar General announced a partnership with QSIC to roll out an AI-enabled in-store audio network across approximately 6,000 stores, doubling its current audio presence to 12,000 stores by Q2 2026. This initiative aims to provide more relevant and localized audio experiences for customers and data-driven advertising for brand partners. The platform will leverage AI to deliver targeted messaging, enhancing the shopping experience and offering brands accountable measurement capabilities.

feed.title: Paragon Capital Management Inc. Takes Position in Coterra Energy Inc. $CTRA
feed.summary: Paragon Capital Management Inc. has reported purchasing a new position of 41,369 shares in Coterra Energy Inc. ($CTRA) during the fourth quarter, valued at approximately $1.089 million. Coterra Energy offers a quarterly dividend of $0.22, yielding 2.6%, and has a market capitalization of $25.39 billion. The stock currently holds an average rating of "Moderate Buy" among analysts with an average price target of $36.43.

feed.title: Paragon Capital Management Inc. Invests $1.62 Million in Citizens Financial Group, Inc. $CFG
feed.summary: Paragon Capital Management Inc. has acquired a new position in Citizens Financial Group, Inc. (NYSE:CFG) by purchasing 27,661 shares valued at approximately $1.62 million in the fourth quarter. This investment makes Citizens Financial Group the 26th largest holding in Paragon's portfolio, representing 1.2% of its total. The stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average target price of $69.14.

feed.title: Old North State Wealth Management LLC Acquires 4,810 Shares of The Boeing Company $BA
feed.summary: Old North State Wealth Management LLC increased its stake in The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA) by 21.2% in the fourth quarter, purchasing an additional 4,810 shares to bring its total holdings to 27,486 shares valued at $5.97 million. This makes Boeing the firm's 7th largest holding, representing approximately 2.8% of its investment portfolio. The article also highlights Boeing's strong recent quarterly earnings, various institutional investor activities, positive and negative market sentiments surrounding the company, and recent analyst ratings.

feed.title: Albemarle Corporation $ALB Shares Sold by Old North State Wealth Management LLC
feed.summary: Old North State Wealth Management LLC reduced its stake in Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) by 35% in Q4 2025, selling 10,904 shares. CEO J. Kent Masters also sold 11,783 shares for approximately $2.01 million. Albemarle reported quarterly EPS of -$0.53, missing estimates, but revenue beat expectations at $1.43 billion, marking a 15.9% year-over-year increase. The company maintains a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating with an average price target of $171.24.

feed.title: ANI Pharmaceuticals Announces the Launch of Carbamazepine Extended-Release Capsules
feed.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals has announced the launch of Carbamazepine Extended-Release Capsules, 100 mg, 200 mg, and 300 mg, a generic version of Carbatrol®. This launch strengthens ANI's Generics portfolio and aims to improve patient access to essential medicines. The U.S. annual sales for this product are approximately $65 million based on recent IQVIA data.

feed.title: Here Are Monday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Adobe, Best Buy, Bilibili, Constellation Brands, CoreWeave, Nike, Starbucks, T-Mobile, and More
feed.summary: This article details top Wall Street analyst research calls from Monday, April 13, 2026, including upgrades for Bilibili, Constellation Brands, CoreWeave, Starbucks, and T-Mobile, and downgrades for Best Buy, Centessa Pharmaceuticals, Hewlett Packard Enterprise, Nebius Group, and Nike. It also notes new initiations for Adobe, Credo Technology Group Holding, Johnson Controls, Rollins, and Tempus AI. The report prefaces these calls with an overview of market futures, treasury bonds, oil and gas, gold, and crypto performance ahead of the first-quarter earnings season.

feed.title: ANI Pharma targets $65M U.S. market with new Carbatrol generic
feed.summary: ANI Pharmaceuticals (ANIP) has launched Carbamazepine Extended-Release Capsules in 100 mg, 200 mg, and 300 mg strengths, a generic version of Carbatrol. This launch targets a U.S. market with approximately $65 million in annual sales, aiming to strengthen ANI's generics portfolio and improve patient access to essential medicines. The company highlights its commitment to quality and compliance while expanding in this limited-competition segment.

feed.title: Vaca Muerta taps Halliburton for first overseas electric fracking
feed.summary: Halliburton has secured a multibillion-dollar contract with YPF to provide unconventional completions services in Argentina's Vaca Muerta shale region, marking the company's significant expansion in the country. This strategic collaboration will see the first international deployment of Halliburton’s ZEUS® electric fracturing services and includes its OCTIV® Auto Frac service, integrating electrification, automation, and advanced digital workflows to enhance efficiency and reduce emissions. The agreement underscores YPF's confidence in Halliburton's technology leadership for large-scale unconventional fracturing operations.

feed.title: Industrial supplier Fastenal tops $2.2B in sales as demand rises
feed.summary: Fastenal Company (NASDAQ:FAST) reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, with net sales increasing by 12.4% to $2.2 billion, driven by improved customer contract signings and broader demand. Diluted net income per share rose to $0.30, up 13.6% from the previous year. The company emphasized its strategic initiatives, including increasing sales effectiveness and expanding digital technology adoption, while also detailing cash flow and balance sheet improvements.

feed.title: Bank of America Corp expected to post earnings of $1.01 a share - Earnings Preview
feed.summary: Bank of America Corp (BAC) is projected to report earnings of $1.01 per share, according to this earnings preview. The information is sourced from Refinitiv and Reuters. The article is a brief announcement regarding the anticipated financial results.

feed.title: McDonald's to roll out new energy drinks, specialty sodas this year - report
feed.summary: McDonald's is reportedly planning to introduce new energy drinks and specialty sodas in its U.S. restaurants this year. The offerings are expected to include Red Bull Dragonberry Energizer, according to a report citing sources familiar with the matter and company documents. This move indicates McDonald's strategy to expand its beverage menu.

feed.title: Running Oak Capital LLC Sells 6,781 Shares of STERIS plc $STE
feed.summary: Running Oak Capital LLC reduced its stake in STERIS plc (NYSE:STE) by 10.1%, selling 6,781 shares and now owning 60,038 shares valued at $15.22 million. Concurrently, STERIS director Cynthia L. Feldmann sold 3,098 shares, reducing her position by over 81%. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for STERIS with a target price of $275.20, following strong Q4 earnings, increased revenue, and positive FY2026 guidance.

feed.title: Running Oak Capital LLC Sells 6,712 Shares of Roper Technologies, Inc. $ROP
feed.summary: Running Oak Capital LLC reduced its stake in Roper Technologies by 22.3%, selling 6,712 shares and now holding 23,435 shares valued at $10.432 million. Despite this, Director Thomas Patrick Joyce Jr. recently bought 1,400 shares. Wall Street analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus with a target price of $476.60, and Roper Technologies provided a FY2026 EPS guidance of $21.300-$21.550.

feed.title: Jefferies Adjusts Price Target on Diamondback Energy to $200 From $177, Maintains Hold Rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Diamondback Energy (NASDAQ:FANG) to $200 from $177 but chose to maintain a Hold rating on the stock. This adjustment comes alongside other analyst ratings for the company, including Bernstein raising its target to $237 with an Outperform rating. Diamondback Energy specializes in the exploration and production of oil and natural gas, with crude oil comprising the majority of its net sales.

feed.title: Sippican Capital Advisors Sells 13,578 Shares of Citigroup Inc. $C
feed.summary: Sippican Capital Advisors significantly reduced its stake in Citigroup Inc. by selling 13,578 shares, cutting its holdings by 48.8% to 14,237 shares valued at $1.661 million. This sale comes as institutional investors like Capital World Investors and Franklin Resources are increasing their positions, while Citigroup insider Cantu Ernesto Torres also sold a substantial number of shares. Analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating for Citigroup with a consensus price target of $127.41, and the company is preparing to release its Q1 earnings on April 14th.

feed.title: Running Oak Capital LLC Reduces Holdings in General Dynamics Corporation $GD
feed.summary: Running Oak Capital LLC decreased its stake in General Dynamics Corporation by 11.2% in Q4, now holding 47,217 shares valued at $15.90 million. Despite this, General Dynamics beat Q4 earnings and revenue estimates, raised its quarterly dividend, and received a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average target price of $384.53. Insiders, including CEO Phebe Novakovic, have sold a total of 51,260 shares in the past three months.

feed.title: Mizuho Adjusts Price Target on Prudential Financial to $101 From $113, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Mizuho has decreased its price target for Prudential Financial (NYSE: PRU) from $113 to $101 while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a updated valuation from the analyst firm. The article also mentions recent price target changes from other analyst firms for Prudential Financial.

feed.title: Latest AIRJ News - Montana Technologies Announces First Quarte...
feed.summary: Montana Technologies (NASDAQ: AIRJ) reported its first-quarter 2024 results, highlighting a successful business combination, a capital raise exceeding $50 million, and a new joint venture with GE Vernova to advance AirJoule® technology. The company also announced key appointments to its board and executive team, with its common stock and warrants now trading on Nasdaq under 'AIRJ' and 'AIRJW'. The technology focuses on atmospheric water harvesting and energy-efficient dehumidification for various applications.

feed.title: News Corp (NWS) updates US$1B share buyback with detailed ASX data
feed.summary: News Corp has updated its US$1 billion share buyback program with detailed ASX data, revealing recent repurchases of both Class A and Class B common stock. The company has acquired 4,650,723 Class A securities for over $112 million and 2,266,220 Class B securities for over $62 million, with prices ranging from $22.20 to $31.40. These repurchases are part of the 2025 Repurchase Program, which aims to enhance shareholder value, though future acquisitions are subject to market conditions and other factors.

feed.title: XCOR Stock Fund Price and Chart — AMEX:XCOR
feed.summary: This article provides a comprehensive overview of the FundX ETF (XCOR), including its price, key statistics, and performance. It details the fund's investment strategy, which involves investing in ETFs synced with market leaders, primarily core equity funds globally. The article also covers frequently asked questions about ETFs, XCOR's specifics like AUM and expense ratio, and its technical analysis.

feed.title: Running Oak Capital LLC Sells 11,901 Shares of Jacobs Solutions Inc. $J
feed.summary: Running Oak Capital LLC decreased its holdings in Jacobs Solutions Inc. by 10.2% in the fourth quarter, selling 11,901 shares and retaining 104,373 shares valued at approximately $13.8 million. Jacobs Solutions has a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts with an average price target of $156.60, and recently reported strong quarterly earnings and increased its dividend. Other institutional investors have also adjusted their stakes in the company, and an insider transaction saw President Shannon Miller sell a portion of her shares.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. stock (US58933Y1055): Is Keytruda's dominance now the real test for sustained grow
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. faces a critical juncture regarding the sustained growth of its stock, which is heavily reliant on its blockbuster cancer drug, Keytruda, and the looming patent expiration around 2028. The article emphasizes the importance of Merck's pipeline diversification and R&D execution for its future performance in the U.S. market, especially given the volatility in the healthcare sector and increasing competitive pressures. While analysts are generally positive, citing Keytruda's demand and new drug launches, investors are advised to monitor regulation, patent cliffs, and pipeline developments closely.

feed.title: Arqit Quantum Posts Sharp Preliminary Revenue Growth for First Half of Fiscal 2026
feed.summary: Arqit Quantum (ARQQ) reported preliminary unaudited revenue of $620,000–$630,000 for the first half of fiscal 2026, a substantial increase from $67,000 in the prior-year period and exceeding its full-year 2025 revenue of $530,000. This growth was attributed to existing contracts and three new agreements. Despite positive revenue momentum, TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates ARQQ as Neutral due to weak financial performance and bearish technicals, even though one analyst maintains a Buy rating with a $60.00 price target.

feed.title: Regeneron taps Telix in $40M push for next-generation cancer drugs
feed.summary: Telix Pharmaceuticals and Regeneron have entered a strategic collaboration to co-develop next-generation radiopharmaceutical therapies for cancer, with Telix receiving an upfront payment of $40 million. The partnership includes a 50/50 cost and profit-sharing model for global commercialization, with potential milestones for Telix reaching up to $2.1 billion. This collaboration leverages Telix's radiopharmaceutical expertise and Regeneron's antibody technologies to advance precision oncology treatments and radio-diagnostics.

feed.title: Applied Materials to construct new buildings for manufacturing, logistics operations in expansion
feed.summary: Applied Materials, a major semiconductor equipment producer, plans to expand its Blackburn Industrial Park facility in Gloucester by constructing new manufacturing and logistics buildings. This expansion will involve decommissioning two existing wind turbines and is aimed at increasing efficiency and meeting the growing demand for computer chips. The company also anticipates an increase in its local workforce and is designing its new buildings to be "solar ready."

feed.title: Superstate and Invesco Expand Strategic Partnership
feed.summary: Superstate and Invesco have announced an expanded strategic partnership, including an additional investment by Invesco Private Capital in Superstate's Series B funding round. This partnership builds on their earlier agreement for Invesco Advisers to become the investment manager for Superstate's tokenized fund, USTB, in Q2 2026. Both companies emphasize their shared belief in tokenization as the future of investment products and the importance of collaborative innovation in the evolving digital asset market.

feed.title: Palo Alto Networks extends Santa Clara campus leases through 2040
feed.summary: Palo Alto Networks (NASDAQ: PANW) has extended leases for several office buildings in Santa Clara, California, through July 31, 2040. The cybersecurity company, with a market cap of $126.3 billion, will receive a tenant improvement allowance and has options for further extensions. This news follows strong Q2 fiscal 2026 results and recent analyst reiterations of Overweight ratings.

feed.title: Citigroup Adjusts PT on Air Products and Chemicals to $315 From $285, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for Air Products and Chemicals (APD) to $315, up from the previous $285, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment comes alongside other similar analyst actions, with BMO Capital also increasing its price target for APD to $325. The company specializes in industrial gases and has diverse product families including bulk gases, tonnage gases, performance chemicals, and cryogenic equipment.

feed.title: BMO Capital Adjusts PT on Air Products and Chemicals to $325 From $282, Keeps Market Perform Rating
feed.summary: BMO Capital has revised its price target for Air Products and Chemicals (APD) to $325, up from $282, while maintaining a "Market Perform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects an updated valuation for the company. The article also notes similar adjustments from other firms, including Citigroup and UBS.

feed.title: AMETEK, Inc. $AME Shares Sold by Running Oak Capital LLC
feed.summary: Running Oak Capital LLC decreased its stake in AMETEK, Inc. by 9.5% in Q4 2025, selling 8,438 shares and retaining 80,084 shares valued at $16.44 million. Despite this, several other large institutions significantly increased their positions, leading to an institutional ownership of 87.43%. AMETEK reported strong Q4 earnings, revenue growth, and raised its dividend and full-year guidance for 2026.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Upgrades Williams-Sonoma to Buy From Neutral, Adjusts PT to $218 From $185
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has upgraded Williams-Sonoma (WSM) from a "Neutral" to a "Buy" rating. The firm also increased its price target for the home furnishings retailer to $218, up from the previous $185. This revised outlook reflects a more positive assessment of Williams-Sonoma's stock performance potential.

feed.title: Wolfe Research Adjusts PT on Apollo Global Management to $135 From $159, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: Wolfe Research has revised its price target for Apollo Global Management (APO) to $135, down from $159, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment comes shortly after BMO Capital also lowered its price target for Apollo Global Management to $108 from $116. The article highlights recent analyst recalibrations for the alternative asset management firm.
